name: entity-create
description: Declarative entity-creation buttons. Each consuming blueprint declares new_entity_buttons[] in its manifest; installer materializes either a nav_buttons action (kind: nav_buttons) or an injected AccentButton block into a target file (kind: hub). The EntityCreate CustomJS class executes prompts → frontmatter hydration → file create → open. Replaces 7 hand-authored New<X>Button classes across meetings/people/project/scratch/finance. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.47.0): render() consumes customJS.Icons.resolve for kebab-name → SVG translation (fixes BUG-1 from headspace Phase 3); JSON-schema tightens body_template + extra_files[].body_template to basename-only (fixes BUG-3/4 path-resolution mismatch). v0.2.1 PATCH (v0.48.0 S7): FLN-c — plusIcon SVG 16x16 → 15x15 for size consistency with Tier 1 vendored icons in icons mechanism (all 21 Tier 1 SVGs are 15x15). Behavior-preserving 1px change in the fallback path (when Icons.resolve returns null). v0.3.2 PATCH (v0.50.4): _createExtra now ensures the parent dir of xPath when filename_pattern itself embeds a subfolder (e.g. "wiki/Wiki.md"). Previously only xFolder (= folder + optional subfolder field) was ensured; vault.create against a missing parent silently left an empty file. Forward-defense for filename_pattern with embedded slashes; canonical form remains the subfolder field. v0.4.0 MINOR (v0.68.0): new_entity_buttons[].render_in is now optional in both the JSON schema and the installer's resolveEntityCreateEntry validator. Entries with no render_in are registry-only — the materializer's injection loop short-circuits cleanly, EntityCreate.create() dispatch still works (registry stays populated). Enables blueprints to own button rendering when a custom flex-row layout is required (scratch v0.5.0 uses this to host both '+ New Scratch' and 'Hub' inside one ScratchDayActions-drawn row).
